message:
fix(platform): harden async persistence, load shedding distribution, and integer safety

Move admin_state persistence to spawn_blocking to avoid blocking the
async runtime during state snapshots.

Replace modulo-based load shedding ticket sequence with an LCG hash
to distribute dropped traffic smoothly instead of in contiguous blocks.

Add safe integer conversions (try_from with saturation) in fcp-raptorq
decoder, fcp-mesh degraded encoder, fcp-sandbox WASI host, and Windows
sandbox job limits to prevent silent truncation on platforms with
different pointer widths.

Clean up trailing whitespace in fwc atomic write paths, core capability
formatting, batch handler, supervisor, and gossip modules.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
